## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? (e.g., "I can't do X because...")

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution or API.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Example Usage

```bash
# How would the user interact with this feature?
aiyu-multi-agent ...
```

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.
